summarization.a: The figure illustrates a reaction pathway. B+A/s/ transformed into AB/s/ after energy Ead is released. A transition state is reached after a energy barrier is overcome releasing D+C/s/.
summarization.b: The figure illustrates a reaction pathway. B+A/s/ transformed into AB/s/ after energy Ead is released. A transition state is reached after enough energy is added to the system, releasing D+C/s/.

a.question: How much energy us the energy barrier and how can this be added to the system?
a.answer: a	The required energy is Ead-Ef. This energy can be applied by first setting a certain table temperature.

a.question: After the transition state is reached, what will happen to the surface?
a.answer: a	After the transition state has been reached, reaction products D will be formed, leaving the C/s surface.

b.question: How much energy is released upon the formation of AB/s/?
